{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Manager (Client Acquisition & Growth)",
  "description": "Paycita is a fast-growing fintech and SaaS company helping businesses simplify and automate their payment, financial, and customer management processes. Our platform empowers organizations to grow smarter, faster, and more efficiently through digital tools built for the modern business world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Manager (Client Acquisition &amp; Growth)

Job Location: Ikosi-Ketu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (On-site / Hybrid)

About the Role


	Paycita is hiring an Account Manager to acquire, onboard, and grow new clients on the Paycita platform. If you have the energy of a marketer, the structure of a sales professional, and the confidence of a relationship manager, this role is built for you.
	This is not an accounting role.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Identify, prospect, and onboard new clients.
	Run digital and in-person outreach campaigns.
	Conduct product demos and close subscription deals.
	Manage and grow client accounts.
	Drive retention, upsell, and cross-sell opportunities.
	Submit weekly performance reports.


Qualifications


	OND / HND / BSc in Marketing, Business Admin, or related field.
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in sales, marketing, business development, or account management.
	Strong communication and persuasion skills.
	Self-motivated, confident, and target-driven.
	Experience in Fintech / SaaS experience is a plus.


Compensation


	Base Salary: N80,000 / month
	Commission: 10% monthly on every active client&rsquo;s subscription (uncapped)
	Example: 10 clients &times; N50,000 subscription = N50,000 commission/month, in addition to your base salary.
	The more clients you bring in and retain, the more you earn.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Hr@myafrimall.com using &quot;Account Manager &ndash; Paycita&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Interviews will be conducted in partnership with Myafrimall Logistics Limited at our Lagos office.",

Account Manager (Client Acquisition & Growth) Job at Paycita




        
    

        
        Paycita is a fast-growing fintech and SaaS company helping businesses simplify and automate their payment, financial, and customer management processes. Our platform empowers organizations to grow smarter, faster, and more efficiently through digital tools built for the modern business world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Manager (Client Acquisition & Growth)

Job Location: Ikosi-Ketu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (On-site / Hybrid)

About the Role
     

            
    




	Paycita is hiring an Account Manager to acquire, onboard, and grow new clients on the Paycita platform. If you have the energy of a marketer, the structure of a sales professional, and the confidence of a relationship manager, this role is built for you.
	This is not an accounting role.


What You’ll Do


	Identify, prospect, and onboard new clients.
	Run digital and in-person outreach campaigns.
	Conduct product demos and close subscription deals.
	Manage and grow client accounts.
	Drive retention, upsell, and cross-sell opportunities.
	Submit weekly performance reports.


Qualifications


	OND / HND / BSc in Marketing, Business Admin, or related field.
	1–3 years of experience in sales, marketing, business development, or account management.
	Strong communication and persuasion skills.
	Self-motivated, confident, and target-driven.
	Experience in Fintech / SaaS experience is a plus.


Compensation


	Base Salary: N80,000 / month
	Commission: 10% monthly on every active client’s subscription (uncapped)
	Example: 10 clients × N50,000 subscription = N50,000 commission/month, in addition to your base salary.
	The more clients you bring in and retain, the more you earn.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Account Manager – Paycita" as the subject of the email.

Note: Interviews will be conducted in partnership with Myafrimall Logistics Limited at our Lagos office.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head, Media Relations",
  "description": "Renaissance African Energy Company (RENAISSANCE) is on a dynamic journey to evolve into a world-class energy powerhouse, unleashing the entirety of our growth potential through collaborative efforts. Seamlessly weaving through the midstream value chain and fortifying our core capabilities, we stand ready to be the cornerstone of national development and industrialization, signaling a new era of unparalleled progress.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Media Relations

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	Enable the achievement of Renaissance&rsquo;s business objectives through effective media engagement, brand positioning, and communications strategies that reflect the company&rsquo;s independent accountability and evolving scope of operations.


Responsibilities


	Provide strategic counsel to Renaissance leadership on media engagement, reputation management, and communications.
	Communicate Renaissance&rsquo;s capabilities, achievements, and thought leadership to build preference with external stakeholders.
	Develop and execute credible media relations strategies that reflect Renaissance&rsquo;s business priorities and Africa-wide ambitions.
	Monitor and influence external trends, issues, and risks through proactive engagement with media stakeholders.
	Ensure reputational opportunities and risks are identified early, mitigated, and integrated into business planning.
	Lead the Media Relations team, fostering collaboration across Renaissance&rsquo;s corporate functions.
	Deploy a robust 24/7 media management strategy tailored to Renaissance&rsquo;s independent operations.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with Nigerian and international journalists, correspondents, and media houses.
	Maximise positive coverage of Renaissance and minimise negative exposure through proactive storytelling and strategic campaigns.
	Organise press conferences, product launches, facility visits, and media briefings to showcase Renaissance&rsquo;s operations.
	Provide crisis response capability at national and regional levels, ensuring Renaissance&rsquo;s voice is clear and credible.
	Train and coach company spokespersons to effectively represent Renaissance in the media.
	Write speeches for Renaissance leadership, ensuring alignment with company narratives and strategic messaging.
	Oversee editorial review of technical and non-technical papers, assessing disclosure risks and ensuring messaging consistency in line with approved company narratives.
	Oversee both traditional and digital media channels, including social media platforms, to ensure consistent messaging and effective engagement.


Requirements


	A Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mass Communication, Journalism, Media Studies, Public Relations, Marketing, Communications, or a related field
	A minimum of 14 years of experience with a deep understanding of the Nigerian political and media landscape, with awareness of regional dynamics.


The successful candidate should have:


	Proven experience as a journalist or in corporate communications within complex organisations.
	Extensive frontline experience handling media enquiries on sensitive or controversial issues.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with ability to craft compelling narratives.
	Strong networks within the media industry.
	Demonstrated ability to manage and influence senior stakeholders.
	Experience in issues management and crisis communications.
	High personal integrity and resilience.
	Membership of the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) is required.

Head, Media Relations Job at Renaissance African Energy Company




        
    

        
        Renaissance African Energy Company (RENAISSANCE) is on a dynamic journey to evolve into a world-class energy powerhouse, unleashing the entirety of our growth potential through collaborative efforts. Seamlessly weaving through the midstream value chain and fortifying our core capabilities, we stand ready to be the cornerstone of national development and industrialization, signaling a new era of unparalleled progress.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Media Relations

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose
     

            
    




	Enable the achievement of Renaissance’s business objectives through effective media engagement, brand positioning, and communications strategies that reflect the company’s independent accountability and evolving scope of operations.


Responsibilities


	Provide strategic counsel to Renaissance leadership on media engagement, reputation management, and communications.
	Communicate Renaissance’s capabilities, achievements, and thought leadership to build preference with external stakeholders.
	Develop and execute credible media relations strategies that reflect Renaissance’s business priorities and Africa-wide ambitions.
	Monitor and influence external trends, issues, and risks through proactive engagement with media stakeholders.
	Ensure reputational opportunities and risks are identified early, mitigated, and integrated into business planning.
	Lead the Media Relations team, fostering collaboration across Renaissance’s corporate functions.
	Deploy a robust 24/7 media management strategy tailored to Renaissance’s independent operations.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with Nigerian and international journalists, correspondents, and media houses.
	Maximise positive coverage of Renaissance and minimise negative exposure through proactive storytelling and strategic campaigns.
	Organise press conferences, product launches, facility visits, and media briefings to showcase Renaissance’s operations.
	Provide crisis response capability at national and regional levels, ensuring Renaissance’s voice is clear and credible.
	Train and coach company spokespersons to effectively represent Renaissance in the media.
	Write speeches for Renaissance leadership, ensuring alignment with company narratives and strategic messaging.
	Oversee editorial review of technical and non-technical papers, assessing disclosure risks and ensuring messaging consistency in line with approved company narratives.
	Oversee both traditional and digital media channels, including social media platforms, to ensure consistent messaging and effective engagement.


Requirements


	A Bachelor’s Degree in Mass Communication, Journalism, Media Studies, Public Relations, Marketing, Communications, or a related field
	A minimum of 14 years of experience with a deep understanding of the Nigerian political and media landscape, with awareness of regional dynamics.


The successful candidate should have:


	Proven experience as a journalist or in corporate communications within complex organisations.
	Extensive frontline experience handling media enquiries on sensitive or controversial issues.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with ability to craft compelling narratives.
	Strong networks within the media industry.
	Demonstrated ability to manage and influence senior stakeholders.
	Experience in issues management and crisis communications.
	High personal integrity and resilience.
	Membership of the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) is required.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing and Growth Executive",
  "description": "Marvel Advisory - We are a recruitment agency that was founded in 2018 by a team of Human Resources and Business Consultants with the aim of transforming the workforce by inspiring productivity, effectiveness, value driven and innovative teams across businesses in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing and Growth Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time, Permanent
Department: Commercial and Sales
Reports To: Managing Director
Industry: Technical / Engineering / B2B Services

?About the Role


	?Are you a commercially-driven, tech-forward marketer who excels at turning complex technical concepts into high-converting campaigns? Do you thrive at the intersection of creative storytelling, data analytics, and cutting-edge technology?
	?We are seeking a Marketing &amp; Growth Executive to fully own and accelerate our marketing function.
	In this role, you won&#39;t just build brand visibility and drive qualified leads for our sales pipeline&mdash;you will also act as our internal AI Transformation Champion. You will lead the charge in identifying, piloting, and scaling AI-powered workflows to revolutionize our marketing operations and enhance cross-functional business efficiency.
	?If you are a self-starter eager to tie marketing strategies directly to revenue outcomes while staying ahead of the technological curve, we want to hear from you.


?Key Responsibilities


	?Growth &amp; Lead Generation: Plan and execute multi-channel B2B campaigns (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, Email, and Content Marketing) to consistently feed the sales pipeline with qualified leads.
	?AI Adoption &amp; Governance: Develop a phased AI adoption roadmap. Integrate generative AI and automation tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, Midjourney) into daily workflows while establishing clear ethics, data privacy, and brand-safety guidelines.
	?Content &amp; Thought Leadership: Partner closely with engineering and technical teams to translate complex capabilities into benefit-driven messaging, case studies, whitepapers, and digital content.
	?Website &amp; SEO Management: Own the company website end-to-end, optimizing user experience, tracking analytics (Google Analytics/Search Console), and implementing robust SEO strategies.
	?Sales Enablement: Build and maintain a centralized library of pitch decks, product datasheets, capability statements, and competitor intelligence to support the sales team during tenders and high-stakes proposals.
	?Events &amp; Partnerships: Manage the strategy, logistics, and ROI execution for industry trade shows, exhibitions, webinars, and partner co-marketing initiatives.
	?Cross-Functional AI Training: Deliver basic AI literacy programs and create prompt libraries to help teams outside of marketing (Sales, HR, Operations) automate repetitive tasks.


?First 90-Day Priorities


	?Conduct a comprehensive audit of existing brand assets, website UX, and digital positioning.
	?Deliver a data-backed 6-to-12-month marketing plan aligned with company sales targets.
	?Present a phased AI readiness assessment and quick-win adoption roadmap to executive leadership.
	?Launch at least one highly optimized lead generation campaign with measurable KPIs.


?What We Are Looking For
?Qualifications:


	?Essential: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business, or a related discipline.
	?Essential: Professional marketing certification (e.g., CIM, Google Ads, HubSpot Inbound).
	?Desirable: Certifications in AI/Data Analytics (e.g., Google AI Essentials), Project Management (PMP/Agile), or a Master&rsquo;s/MBA.


?Experience &amp; Skills:


	?5 - 8 years of progressive experience spanning both brand/content marketing and digital performance marketing.
	?Proven track record of B2B lead generation with a clear tie-in to sales pipeline growth.
	?Hands-on proficiency with CMS platforms (WordPress, Webflow, etc.), SEO tools, and analytics dashboards.
	?Demonstrable experience using AI tools professionally for content velocity, campaign optimization, or data analysis.
	?Exceptional writing and storytelling abilities, with a knack for clarifying complex technical or engineering-led concepts.
	?Asset: Prior experience within the Nigerian or West African B2B market, specifically in the industrial, energy, or engineering sectors.


?Pre-Employment Requirements:


	?Satisfactory background and reference checks.
	?A diverse portfolio showcasing previous campaigns, writing samples, or performance reports.
	?AI Practical Exercise: Shortlisted candidates will be asked to demonstrate their AI tool proficiency and prompt engineering skills through a practical use-case scenario during the interview process.


Salary
N300,000 - N500,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: marvelrecruitment7@gmail.com using &quot;Marketing and Growth Specialist&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Marketing and Growth Executive Job at Marvel Advisory




        
    

        
        Marvel Advisory - We are a recruitment agency that was founded in 2018 by a team of Human Resources and Business Consultants with the aim of transforming the workforce by inspiring productivity, effectiveness, value driven and innovative teams across businesses in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing and Growth Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time, Permanent
Department: Commercial and Sales
Reports To: Managing Director
Industry: Technical / Engineering / B2B Services

?About the Role
     

            
    




	?Are you a commercially-driven, tech-forward marketer who excels at turning complex technical concepts into high-converting campaigns? Do you thrive at the intersection of creative storytelling, data analytics, and cutting-edge technology?
	?We are seeking a Marketing & Growth Executive to fully own and accelerate our marketing function.
	In this role, you won't just build brand visibility and drive qualified leads for our sales pipeline—you will also act as our internal AI Transformation Champion. You will lead the charge in identifying, piloting, and scaling AI-powered workflows to revolutionize our marketing operations and enhance cross-functional business efficiency.
	?If you are a self-starter eager to tie marketing strategies directly to revenue outcomes while staying ahead of the technological curve, we want to hear from you.


?Key Responsibilities


	?Growth & Lead Generation: Plan and execute multi-channel B2B campaigns (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, Email, and Content Marketing) to consistently feed the sales pipeline with qualified leads.
	?AI Adoption & Governance: Develop a phased AI adoption roadmap. Integrate generative AI and automation tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, Midjourney) into daily workflows while establishing clear ethics, data privacy, and brand-safety guidelines.
	?Content & Thought Leadership: Partner closely with engineering and technical teams to translate complex capabilities into benefit-driven messaging, case studies, whitepapers, and digital content.
	?Website & SEO Management: Own the company website end-to-end, optimizing user experience, tracking analytics (Google Analytics/Search Console), and implementing robust SEO strategies.
	?Sales Enablement: Build and maintain a centralized library of pitch decks, product datasheets, capability statements, and competitor intelligence to support the sales team during tenders and high-stakes proposals.
	?Events & Partnerships: Manage the strategy, logistics, and ROI execution for industry trade shows, exhibitions, webinars, and partner co-marketing initiatives.
	?Cross-Functional AI Training: Deliver basic AI literacy programs and create prompt libraries to help teams outside of marketing (Sales, HR, Operations) automate repetitive tasks.


?First 90-Day Priorities


	?Conduct a comprehensive audit of existing brand assets, website UX, and digital positioning.
	?Deliver a data-backed 6-to-12-month marketing plan aligned with company sales targets.
	?Present a phased AI readiness assessment and quick-win adoption roadmap to executive leadership.
	?Launch at least one highly optimized lead generation campaign with measurable KPIs.


?What We Are Looking For
?Qualifications:


	?Essential: Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business, or a related discipline.
	?Essential: Professional marketing certification (e.g., CIM, Google Ads, HubSpot Inbound).
	?Desirable: Certifications in AI/Data Analytics (e.g., Google AI Essentials), Project Management (PMP/Agile), or a Master’s/MBA.


?Experience & Skills:


	?5 - 8 years of progressive experience spanning both brand/content marketing and digital performance marketing.
	?Proven track record of B2B lead generation with a clear tie-in to sales pipeline growth.
	?Hands-on proficiency with CMS platforms (WordPress, Webflow, etc.), SEO tools, and analytics dashboards.
	?Demonstrable experience using AI tools professionally for content velocity, campaign optimization, or data analysis.
	?Exceptional writing and storytelling abilities, with a knack for clarifying complex technical or engineering-led concepts.
	?Asset: Prior experience within the Nigerian or West African B2B market, specifically in the industrial, energy, or engineering sectors.


?Pre-Employment Requirements:


	?Satisfactory background and reference checks.
	?A diverse portfolio showcasing previous campaigns, writing samples, or performance reports.
	?AI Practical Exercise: Shortlisted candidates will be asked to demonstrate their AI tool proficiency and prompt engineering skills through a practical use-case scenario during the interview process.


Salary
N300,000 - N500,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Marketing and Growth Specialist" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager",
  "description": "Spacefinish is a workspace infrastructure firm that uses decades of insights to provide measurable business outcomes for enterprise and Fortune 100 companies. We seamlessly integrate design, build, and office management through engineered systems, technology, and strict stage-gate controls to ensure projects are delivered on specification, on schedule, and with zero revised budgets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Finance Manager will handle the company&rsquo;s financial health by managing budgeting, forecasting, reporting, and compliance processes.
	This individual will work closely with leadership to align financial planning with the company&rsquo;s strategic direction, ensuring that Spacefinish continues to scale sustainably.


Key Responsibilities


	Budgeting &amp; Forecasting: Develop, implement, and monitor annual budgets and forecasts that align with business objectives.
	Financial Strategy: Support the leadership team in financial planning, fundraising, and capital structuring decisions.
	Reporting &amp; Analysis: Prepare and analyze financial reports to provide insights into company performance, risks, and opportunities.
	Tax &amp; Compliance: Ensure timely tax filings, compliance with financial regulations, and liaise with tax authorities (LIRS, FIRS).
	Financial Modeling: Develop models to support business planning, cost optimization, and investment decision-making.
	Financial Control: Oversee accounting operations, audit preparation, and process improvement initiatives.
	Team Leadership: Mentor and manage finance team members to build capacity and accountability.


Success Metrics


	Accuracy and timeliness of financial reporting.
	Effective budget management and cost optimization.
	Improved financial efficiency and compliance.
	Successful fundraising or investment outcomes.
	Contribution to business growth and profitability.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of post-qualification experience, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Professional certification (ACCA, ICAN, CFA) is required.
	Proven experience managing an organization with annual revenue above ?700 million.
	Strong expertise in financial modeling, budgeting, fundraising, and investment planning.
	Experience in industries like construction, real estate, consulting, or design/build is an advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Financial Acumen &amp; Strategic Thinking
	Leadership &amp; People Management
	Operational Excellence
	Business Planning &amp; Analysis
	Treasury &amp; Cash Flow Management
	Tax Management &amp; IFRS Knowledge
	Communication &amp; Stakeholder Management.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: hiring@spacefinish.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Finance Manager Job at Spacefinish




        
    

        
        Spacefinish is a workspace infrastructure firm that uses decades of insights to provide measurable business outcomes for enterprise and Fortune 100 companies. We seamlessly integrate design, build, and office management through engineered systems, technology, and strict stage-gate controls to ensure projects are delivered on specification, on schedule, and with zero revised budgets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

            
    




	The Finance Manager will handle the company’s financial health by managing budgeting, forecasting, reporting, and compliance processes.
	This individual will work closely with leadership to align financial planning with the company’s strategic direction, ensuring that Spacefinish continues to scale sustainably.


Key Responsibilities


	Budgeting & Forecasting: Develop, implement, and monitor annual budgets and forecasts that align with business objectives.
	Financial Strategy: Support the leadership team in financial planning, fundraising, and capital structuring decisions.
	Reporting & Analysis: Prepare and analyze financial reports to provide insights into company performance, risks, and opportunities.
	Tax & Compliance: Ensure timely tax filings, compliance with financial regulations, and liaise with tax authorities (LIRS, FIRS).
	Financial Modeling: Develop models to support business planning, cost optimization, and investment decision-making.
	Financial Control: Oversee accounting operations, audit preparation, and process improvement initiatives.
	Team Leadership: Mentor and manage finance team members to build capacity and accountability.


Success Metrics


	Accuracy and timeliness of financial reporting.
	Effective budget management and cost optimization.
	Improved financial efficiency and compliance.
	Successful fundraising or investment outcomes.
	Contribution to business growth and profitability.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of post-qualification experience, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Professional certification (ACCA, ICAN, CFA) is required.
	Proven experience managing an organization with annual revenue above ?700 million.
	Strong expertise in financial modeling, budgeting, fundraising, and investment planning.
	Experience in industries like construction, real estate, consulting, or design/build is an advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Financial Acumen & Strategic Thinking
	Leadership & People Management
	Operational Excellence
	Business Planning & Analysis
	Treasury & Cash Flow Management
	Tax Management & IFRS Knowledge
	Communication & Stakeholder Management.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
